_comment: COMMIT-SAFE TEMPLATE. The LIVE manifest is local + gitignored at
written by tools/art/limezu_generator_catalog.py after the user runs the LimeZu

live manifest and resolves sprites/portraits by character id, falling back cleanly

<character_id>.notes: Paths are relative to licensed_assets/limezu/. Rects are [x, y, w, h] in source pixels.
